name: openqueue-monorepo
description: Monorepo for OpenQueue — a Bun-native background job queue with a built-in workbench.

scripts.e2e: docker compose up --wait && turbo run test:transport e2e
scripts.e2e:pg: docker compose up postgres --wait && E2E_WORLD=postgres REDIS_URL=redis://127.0.0.1:9 turbo run test:transport e2e --filter=@openqueue/world-postgres --filter=@openqueue/e2e --concurrency=1
scripts.e2e:split: docker compose up postgres --wait && E2E_WORLD=postgres REDIS_URL=redis://127.0.0.1:9 turbo run e2e:split --filter=@openqueue/e2e --concurrency=1
scripts.release: turbo run build --filter='./packages/*' && bun run scripts/publish.ts
